name: VoltAgent
pricing_notes: Open source framework; VoltOps cloud observability optional (pricing TBD)

auth.notes: Framework itself is auth-free; individual tool providers require their own auth

performance.notes: Framework overhead minimal; performance dominated by underlying LLM and tool calls

agent_readiness.notes: TypeScript-first agent framework inspired by Vercel AI SDK. Native MCP client support built-in. Multi-agent orchestration with supervisor/subagent pattern. VoltOps for tracing. Growing ecosystem.

gotchas: Limited examples for complex multi-agent workflows
best_when: Need native MCP client integration in agent workflows
Building supervisor/subagent patterns with clean abstractions
Teams wanting LangChain alternative with better TypeScript ergonomics
avoid_when: Production systems requiring stable APIs (0.x is pre-stable)
Need mature ecosystem and examples (use LangChain/LlamaIndex)
summary: VoltAgent is a TypeScript-first open-source agent framework built with MCP-native support and clean multi-agent orchestration patterns. Inspired by modern TypeScript patterns (similar to Vercel AI SDK ergonomics). Native MCP client makes it easy to connect agents to MCP servers. Early-stage but growing fast in the TypeScript agent ecosystem.
